toasts.commentsEditWindow: Comments can only be edited within 15 minutes of creation
toasts.amendmentsClosed: Amendments have been closed by a representative.
toasts.documentOpenForAmendments: This document is now open for amendments.
toasts.syncFailed: Failed to sync document updates. Please refresh the page.
toasts.unableToComment: Unable to comment on this proposal. The proposal may have been removed or there's a data inconsistency. Try navigating to the document to comment on the current version.
toasts.failedToUpdateProfile: Failed to update profile. Please try again.

confirm.deleteDocument: Are you sure you want to delete "{{title}}"? This action cannot be undone.
confirm.deleteComment: Are you sure you want to delete this comment?
confirm.deleteProposal: Are you sure you want to delete this proposal? This action cannot be undone.
confirm.deleteStructureProposal: Are you sure you want to delete this structure proposal? This action cannot be undone.
confirm.restoreVersion: Are you sure you want to restore the document to version {{versionNumber}}? This will create a backup of the current state.
confirm.removeCollaborator: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} from this document? They will no longer be able to view or edit the document.
confirm.resignRepresentative: Are you sure you want to resign from your representative position?
confirm.proposeDeletion: Are you sure you want to propose deletion of this document? This will start a voting period.
confirm.cancelDeletionProposal: Are you sure you want to cancel the deletion proposal?

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
validation.commentLength: Comment must be between 1 and 1000 characters
validation.imageSize: Image size should be less than {{maxMb}}MB
validation.invalidImage: Invalid or corrupted image file. Please select a valid image.
validation.invalidImageUrl: Failed to load image from URL. Please check the URL is valid and points to an image.
validation.validUrl: Please enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS URL
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long
validation.passwordComplexity: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter, one uppercase letter, and one number
validation.newPasswordDifferent: New password must be different from current password
validation.descriptionMaxLength: Description must be less than 500 characters

aria.viewSuggestionsAndDiscussion: Click to view suggestions and discussion
aria.addSuggestionFirstToEnableDiffView: Add a suggestion first to enable persistent diff view

timezone.label: Timezone
timezone.description: All dates and times throughout the application will be displayed in your selected timezone.
timezone.browserMismatchWarning: Your profile timezone differs from your browser. Inputs use your profile timezone.

voteRadio.neutralNoOpinion: NEUTRAL - I have no strong opinion
voteRadio.contraDisapprove: CONTRA - I do not approve this proposal
voteRadio.noDisapprove: No - I do not approve this proposal
voteRadio.abstain: Abstain - I choose not to vote
